patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female actively managing her health with a focus on blood pressure and blood sugar control, as evidenced by specific monitoring and medication adherence goals. She underwent a colonoscopy with biopsy on February 21, 2025. Her social history includes daily tobacco use for 50 years, but no alcohol consumption, and she recently reported no COVID-19 exposure. Care involves multiple providers across various specialties, indicating a coordinated approach to her ongoing medical needs.
